note: Lineage manifest for the Provenance Atlas view. BUILD ARTIFACT — regenerate with scripts/build_lineage.py; do not hand-edit. Verified by scripts/verify_lineage.py. Not endorsed by FEMA.

sources.name: FemaWebDisasterSummaries
sources.description: Per-disaster rollup of PA obligated and IHP approved dollars (with HA/ONA and Cat-AB/C-G splits). The authoritative source of the ledger cost figures.

sources.name: DisasterDeclarationsSummaries
sources.description: The declaration ledger: one row per declared area, carrying dates, region/state, county FIPS, and the per-program declaration flags. Feeds disaster identity, the declaration date, and county designations.

sources.name: PublicAssistanceFundedProjectsDetails
sources.description: Project-level PA obligations (one row per funded project), with county, obligated federal share, damage category, and obligation dates. Powers per-county PA dollars, project counts, and the obligation-year buckets.

sources.name: PublicAssistanceFundedProjectsSummaries
sources.description: Pre-aggregated PA summaries by applicant x county (no per-project rows). Used for the browsable per-county PA applicant lists. No OpenFEMA field dictionary is committed for this dataset, so columns are not enumerated here.

sources.name: IndividualsAndHouseholdsProgramValidRegistrations
sources.description: Registrant-level IHP records (one row per valid registration), with county FIPS and approved IHP/HA/ONA dollars. Powers per-county and per-disaster-x-county IHP figures and registration counts.

sources.name: HazardMitigationAssistanceProjects
sources.description: Hazard-mitigation grant projects across all HMA program areas (HMGP plus the non-disaster FMA/PDM/BRIC/LPDM/RFC/SRL family). Powers per-county HMGP subrecipient lists, non-disaster mitigation dollars, and mitigation obligation-year buckets.

sources.name: EmergencyManagementPerformanceGrants
sources.description: Emergency Management Performance Grant (EMPG) awards by state and year. Feeds the per-state non-disaster EMPG preparedness layer.

sources.name: NonDisasterAssistanceFirefighterGrants
sources.description: Despite its name, a grab-bag of all DHS non-disaster preparedness grants (firefighter, Homeland Security, Transit/Port, Nonprofit Security, plus EMPG). Split by program family into the per-state preparedness lenses; EMPG is excluded here to avoid double-count.

sources.name: FimaNfipClaims
sources.description: Public redacted NFIP flood-insurance claims (one row per claim). Rolled up to a Region 5 county x year claims/paid summary with SFHA in/out share. No OpenFEMA field dictionary is committed for this dataset, so columns are not enumerated here.

sources.name: DeclarationDenials
sources.description: Declaration turndowns (requests denied), each carrying a request date and a decision date plus the programs requested. Powers the Declaration Denials block. No OpenFEMA field dictionary is committed for this dataset, so columns are not enumerated here.

sources.name: NOAA Storm Events
sources.description: NOAA Storm Events bulk CSVs (county-FIPS + incident-window join). Source of measured wind, hail, tornado, and reported-damage hazards and event counts.

sources.name: RCC-ACIS
sources.description: RCC-ACIS (NOAA) daily precipitation, summed over the incident window for storm-total and daily-max rainfall per county.

sources.name: USGS Water Services
sources.description: USGS daily-values water service (gage height parameterCd 00065). Offline source of peak river stage; the same service's instantaneous values are also fetched live in the browser for current gage heights on the Watch view.

sources.name: USGS Instantaneous Values
sources.description: USGS instantaneous-values service, fetched live in the browser to show current river gage heights on the Disaster Watch view.

sources.name: NWS api.weather.gov
sources.description: NWS active weather alerts, fetched live in the browser for the Disaster Watch view.

sources.name: NWPS AHPS
sources.description: NWS National Water Prediction Service AHPS flood categories (action/minor/moderate/major) per gauge. Flaky and rate-limited, so resolved offline into gages.json.

sources.name: FEMA Daily Operations Briefing
sources.description: The FEMA Daily Operations Briefing PDF (the only non-OpenFEMA source), archived by the Data Liberation Project. Parsed for the 'Declaration Requests in Process' (pending) table — OpenFEMA publishes no feed of pending requests.

transforms.name: scripts/enrich.py
transforms.method: Join NOAA Storm Events + USGS stage + RCC-ACIS rainfall onto the declaration set (no costs).
transforms.description: Builds the disasters.json hazard envelope by joining measured NOAA/USGS hazards onto Region 5 declarations. Writes hazards only — NOT costs (costs come from add_history.py).

transforms.name: scripts/add_history.py
transforms.method: OpenFEMA pull of FemaWebDisasterSummaries (+ PA project counts) and DisasterDeclarationsSummaries; additive merge.
transforms.description: Pulls older Region 5 disasters with authoritative FEMA costs (PA obligated / IHP approved + breakdowns) and hazards, merging them into disasters.json. The authoritative carrier of the costs fields.

transforms.name: scripts/build_declared.py
transforms.method: Earliest declarationDate per disasterNumber; additive (touches only the 'declared' field).
transforms.description: Adds the original federal declaration date to each disasters.json record; powers the declaration-lag charts. Leaves costs/gages/hazards untouched.

transforms.name: scripts/augment_rain.py
transforms.method: RCC-ACIS daily precip summed over the incident window; additive (rainfall hz fields only).
transforms.description: Refreshes/extends the rainfall hazard fields (rainIn / rainMeanIn / rainDailyMaxIn) in disasters.json; does not touch costs.

transforms.name: scripts/build_gages.py
transforms.method: Resolve gauges via NWPS AHPS + USGS stage; tie crests to declarations.
transforms.description: Builds gages.json (AHPS flood categories + crest history + declaration ties) and writes per-disaster gage lists back into disasters.json.

transforms.name: scripts/patch_ia_flag.py
transforms.method: Backfill/correct the IA-program declaration flags from DisasterDeclarationsSummaries.
transforms.description: Patches the raw IA/IH program flags on disasters.json records so the IA-authorization badge and IHP-money gate classify correctly.

transforms.name: scripts/build_county_map.py
transforms.method: Designations from declarations + per-county PA $/projects from PublicAssistanceFundedProjectsDetails (pandas FIPS join).
transforms.description: Builds county_declarations.json: per-county declaration counts + disaster lists + per-county PA obligated $/projects and per-state totals. The base layer the additive enrichers extend.

transforms.name: scripts/build_county_applicants.py
transforms.method: PA Summaries by applicant x county; no-county applicants routed to per-state statewide buckets; conservation audit.
transforms.description: Adds per-county PA applicant lists (and per-state statewide applicants for state agencies) to county_declarations.json, conserving every applicant row in an audit.

transforms.name: scripts/dedup_applicants.py
transforms.method: Order-preserving normalized-string merge of duplicate per-county applicant entries (no network).
transforms.description: Collapses duplicate per-county PA applicant entries in county_declarations.json, summing PA $/projects and tagging merged provenance. Idempotent; re-run after build_county_map.

transforms.name: scripts/build_county_ihp.py
transforms.method: Registrant-level IHP roll-up per county (network) + per-state IHP from the ledger; dollar-conservation audit.
transforms.description: Adds per-county IHP approved $ + HA/ONA split + registration counts (registrant-level) and per-state IHP rollups (ledger) to county_declarations.json, with a cross-dataset conservation audit.

transforms.name: scripts/build_county_hmgp.py
transforms.method: HazardMitigationAssistanceProjects programArea=HMGP; per-county + per-state STATEWIDE buckets with subrecipient detail.
transforms.description: Adds per-county and per-state HMGP (§404) obligated $ + subrecipient lists to county_declarations.json; dollars conserved into county or statewide buckets.

transforms.name: scripts/build_county_mitigation.py
transforms.method: All non-HMGP HMA program areas (FMA/PDM/BRIC/LPDM/RFC/SRL) per county + per-state statewide; dollars conserved.
transforms.description: Adds the per-county NON-disaster hazard-mitigation grant layer (mitObligated/mitByProgram + per-state statewide) to county_declarations.json.

transforms.name: scripts/build_state_prep.py
transforms.method: EMPG + the DHS preparedness grab-bag (firefighter / Homeland / Transit-Port / Nonprofit / Other) rolled up per state.
transforms.description: Adds per-state non-disaster preparedness grant dollars (EMPG + the preparedness families) to county_declarations.json's state entries.

transforms.name: scripts/build_county_byyear.py
transforms.method: Additive per-county + per-state *ByYear obligation buckets (PA/HMGP/mit true obligation year; IHP proxy by incident year).
transforms.description: Adds the per-county/per-state obligation-by-year buckets that drive the Geography timeline + draggable year-range filter. Dollars conserved against the all-time fields.

transforms.name: scripts/build_disaster_county_ihp.py
transforms.method: Per-disaster x per-county registrant-level IHP roll-up; same dataset/norm as build_county_ihp so figures reconcile.
transforms.description: Builds disaster_county_ihp.json: per-disaster x per-county IHP approved $ + HA/ONA split + valid-registration count, for the mobile Geography disaster drill-down (too heavy to fetch live).

transforms.name: scripts/build_counties.py
transforms.method: Simplify county polygons for FEMA Region 5 into a lean GeoJSON-ish feature list.
transforms.description: Builds r5_counties.json: simplified Region 5 county polygons (fips/name/state/geometry) for the Watch declaration-history map.

transforms.name: scripts/build_county_nfip.py
transforms.method: Per-state FimaNfipClaims pull, rolled up to Region 5 county x year (counts/paid/byYear/SFHA in-out).
transforms.description: Builds nfip.json: the Region 5 county x year NFIP claims rollup (counts, paid with split, by-year, SFHA in/out share). Surfaced as the Geography 'Flood insurance' lens.

transforms.name: scripts/build_county_recent.py
transforms.method: National date-windowed pull of PA (lastObligationDate) + HM (initialObligationDate), filtered to R5 client-side; paginated past the 10k cap.
transforms.description: Builds recent.json: a trailing ~400-day feed of Region 5 PA + Hazard Mitigation obligation rows for the Geography 'Recent activity' view (the 1-year window + live-fetch fallback).

transforms.name: scripts/build_newsreel.py
transforms.method: Latest N + biggest-in-6mo obligations for the two programs that carry a per-item obligation date (PA + HM).
transforms.description: Builds newsreel.json: the per-program 'latest obligations' reel (PA + Hazard Mitigation), Region 5, COVID excluded.

transforms.name: scripts/build_covid.py
transforms.method: Pull the 6 Region 5 COVID-19 (Biological) declarations' PA/IHP/projects.
transforms.description: Builds covid.json: per-state COVID-19 PA obligated / IHP approved / projects, kept OUT of the weather ledger (it is ~7x weather PA).

transforms.name: scripts/build_national.py
transforms.method: All nationwide DR declarations FY2007+ (COVID excluded), lag fields only — no costs/hazards.
transforms.description: Builds disasters_national.json: a lightweight nationwide companion (declaration lag fields only) for the Disaster Timelines 'National' toggle.

transforms.name: scripts/build_denials.py
transforms.method: DeclarationDenials turndowns FY2007+, lean rows with request + decision dates and programs requested.
transforms.description: Builds denials.json: Region 5 + nationwide declaration turndowns for the Declaration Denials block (denial rate, lag distribution, by type/state/program).

transforms.name: scripts/build_pending.py
transforms.method: pdfplumber column-x parse of the latest Daily Ops Brief 'Requests in Process' table; trust-gated on the header count.
transforms.description: Builds pending.json: the parsed 'Declaration Requests in Process' (pending) table from the latest FEMA Daily Operations Briefing PDF (the one non-OpenFEMA source).

transforms.name: scripts/build_request_dates.py
transforms.method: Harvests the full Daily Ops Brief archive, dedups each request, and matches conservatively to OpenFEMA declarations; cross-checked against OpenFEMA denial request dates (ground truth).
transforms.description: Builds request_dates.json: request dates for DECLARED R5 disasters (which OpenFEMA never publishes), harvested from the Daily Ops Brief archive and matched to OpenFEMA declarations, plus a denial-request-date cross-check.

transforms.name: scripts/build_timeline.py
transforms.method: Aggregate measured hazards into one regional monthly series + per-month disaster markers.
transforms.description: Builds timeline.json: one regional monthly hazard series (rain/river/tornado/snow) + per-month disaster list for the Ledger 'Hazard timeline' chart.

transforms.name: scripts/build_context.py
transforms.method: Distill the state panel + disasters into per-state x hazard driver distributions and per-disaster driver values.
transforms.description: Builds context.json (per-state x hazard distribution of each driver metric) and event_nexus.json (per-disaster characterizing driver values placed in history) for the Analyses view.

transforms.name: scripts/build_manifest.py
transforms.method: Per-file bytes + internal dataAsOf + the source's OpenFEMA cadence for every committed data/*.json.
transforms.description: Builds manifest.json: the per-file freshness manifest (dataAsOf vs sourceCadence) that powers the footer 'Data as of' stamp.

transforms.name: applyNfip()
transforms.method: Merge nfip.json onto DECL.counties/states by FIPS (synthesizing claims-only county entries) at load time.
transforms.description: In-browser join: merges the NFIP county x year rollup onto the loaded county_declarations data by FIPS so the Geography 'Flood insurance' lens reuses the standard metric machinery.

artifacts.name: data/context.json
artifacts.description: Per-state x hazard distribution of each driver metric (the Analyses view).

artifacts.name: data/county_declarations.json
artifacts.description: The geo rollup: per-county declaration counts + disaster lists + PA/IHP/HMGP/non-disaster-mitigation $ + applicants/subrecipients + per-state preparedness + *ByYear buckets. Multi-producer (base map + additive enrichers).

artifacts.name: data/covid.json
artifacts.description: Per-state COVID-19 PA obligated / IHP approved / projects (the standalone COVID-19 view).

artifacts.name: data/denials.json
artifacts.description: Region 5 + nationwide declaration turndowns (FY2007+) for the Declaration Denials block.

artifacts.name: data/disaster_county_ihp.json
artifacts.description: Per-disaster x per-county IHP (approved $ + HA/ONA + valid-registration count) for the mobile Geography disaster drill-down.

artifacts.name: data/disasters.json
artifacts.description: 80 Region 5 disasters (FY2007-2026): the source-of-truth ledger with hazards + authoritative PA/IHP costs + gage lists + declaration dates.

artifacts.name: data/disasters_national.json
artifacts.description: Lightweight nationwide companion (~1,196 disasters), declaration-lag fields only, for the Disaster Timelines National toggle.

artifacts.name: data/event_nexus.json
artifacts.description: Per-disaster characterizing driver values placed in history (the Analyses view).

artifacts.name: data/gages.json
artifacts.description: 19 key USGS river gages: AHPS flood categories + crest history + declaration ties.

artifacts.name: data/manifest.json
artifacts.description: Per-file freshness manifest (dataAsOf vs sourceCadence) for the footer staleness stamp.

artifacts.name: data/newsreel.json
artifacts.description: Per-program latest + biggest obligations (PA + Hazard Mitigation) for the Newsreel view.

artifacts.name: data/nfip.json
artifacts.description: Region 5 county x year NFIP claims rollup (counts / paid / by-year / SFHA in-out).

artifacts.name: data/pending.json
artifacts.description: Parsed 'Declaration Requests in Process' table from the latest FEMA Daily Operations Briefing PDF (the one non-OpenFEMA artifact).

artifacts.name: data/r5_counties.json
artifacts.description: Simplified Region 5 county polygons for the Watch declaration-history map.

artifacts.name: data/recent.json
artifacts.description: Trailing ~400-day Region 5 PA + Hazard Mitigation obligation feed for the Geography 'Recent activity' view (hybrid: short windows fetched live, 1-year window from this file).

artifacts.name: data/request_dates.json
artifacts.description: Request dates for DECLARED R5 disasters, harvested from the Daily Ops Brief archive and matched conservatively to OpenFEMA declarations; includes a denial-request-date cross-check. Unofficial brief parse, not OpenFEMA.

artifacts.name: data/timeline.json
artifacts.description: Monthly regional hazard series + per-month disaster list for the Ledger hazard timeline.

surfaces.name: Disaster Ledger
surfaces.description: The default facts-first view: every Region 5 disaster, sortable, with measured hazards + real PA (obligated) and IHP (approved) dollars, the per-disaster detail modal, and the hazard timeline chart.

surfaces.name: Disaster Watch
surfaces.description: Live NWS alerts + live USGS gage heights, with a declaration-history map; trips when a river approaches a past disaster's peak stage or warnings match an analog's hazards.

surfaces.name: Geography view
surfaces.description: Program-first county/state choropleth + measure-driven timeline (PA / IA / HMGP / Non-disaster / NFIP / Recent activity), with desktop and mobile lenses.

surfaces.name: Estimate (beta)
surfaces.description: A deliberately-downplayed comparables heuristic that scales similar past disasters' obligations by population. Not a forecast.

surfaces.name: Disaster Timelines
surfaces.description: Declaration-lag trend + distribution (Region 5 / National toggle), with the Declaration Denials, Declaration-requests-in-process (pending), and Request→decision timing (harvested request dates) blocks at the bottom.

surfaces.name: Newsreel
surfaces.description: The 'latest obligations' reel for the two programs with a per-item obligation date (PA + Hazard Mitigation).

surfaces.name: COVID-19 view
surfaces.description: The standalone COVID-19 view: per-state PA obligated / IHP approved / projects, kept out of the weather ledger.

surfaces.name: Analyses (Context)
surfaces.description: Per-state x hazard driver distributions (context.json) with each disaster's characterizing driver values placed in history (event_nexus.json).

surfaces.name: Footer freshness stamp
surfaces.description: The footer 'Data as of …' staleness stamp, read from the per-file freshness manifest.
